posts.text:
Ted Cruz warns the threat of terrorism is higher than it’s been in decades, blaming open borders and recent attacks as signs the danger is growing:

"Well, Sean, as we sit here tonight, the threat of a terrorist attack is higher now than it has been in decades. And there are two causes of it. Number one, we had four years under Joe Biden of open borders. We had 12 million people flood across the border—basically an open invitation to every terrorist, every Hamas, Hezbollah, and IRGC terrorist to

U.S. Ambassador to the UN Mike Waltz says 135 countries backing a resolution condemning Iran’s strikes shows Tehran is increasingly isolated as Gulf allies stand united:

"This resolution in the Security Council by all of our Gulf allies today. Number one, a lot of these Gulf nations historically have kind of been in a neutral position when it comes to Iran.
